_comment: The connector catalog — pure data, the ONLY place tools are named. The core engine (registry.js) is tool-blind: it loads whatever is listed here. Adding a tool = one connector module in this folder + one entry below (see README.md). Removing a tool = delete its entry (and module). An entry is ACTIVE only while every key in `keys` resolves in Team Knowledge/.env; otherwise it is just an offer on the Connections page.

connectors.label: Calendar (iCal)
connectors.help: Any calendar that exposes an iCal/ICS feed URL — Google Calendar, Outlook, Fastmail, Proton…

connectors.label: Todoist
connectors.help: Shows your open Todoist tasks (title, notes, due date) with a link back to Todoist.

connectors.label: ClickUp
connectors.help: Shows ClickUp tasks assigned to you, with a link back to ClickUp.

connectors.label: Email — starred (IMAP)

keys.label: App password (Gmail: Google Account → Security → App passwords)

connectors.help: Pulls your starred/flagged emails as plannable cards — subject, sender, link back to the mail. Works with Gmail (app password), Fastmail, iCloud, GMX, any IMAP host. Strictly read-only: nothing is marked, moved, or deleted. (Outlook/M365 requires OAuth — ask your assistant for a Graph connector.)
